name: chart/bubble-chart
description: Bubble chart mapping x, y, and size dimensions; radius is area-proportional via sqrt scale.

meta.name: BubbleChart
meta.description: Bubble chart mapping x, y, and size dimensions; radius is area-proportional via sqrt scale.

props.name: series
props.type: { name: string; data: { x: number; y: number; size: number }[] }[]

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

examples.title: Basic bubble chart
examples.code:
import { BubbleChart } from '@cascade-ui/charts'

const series = [{ name: 'Group A', data: [{x:1,y:2,size:10},{x:3,y:4,size:30}] }]
<BubbleChart series={series} title="Bubble" />
